The '''Imperial Embassy''' on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] was located on [[Estalle Island]]. Although officially the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], the Empire maintained an Embassy in the sector much like they did with other [[Imperial client state]]s such as the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|CSA]], [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] and the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]]. The building was in the contemporary Imperial architectural style seen on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

Official functions held by the [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the Tapani Sector or the [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of Procopia were often held in the embassy.
